stemHtml: Flap/slat asymmetry protection devices work by monitoring the position of the high lift devices on each wing. If the system detects an asymmetry...

options.a: the power to drive the flaps/slats is removed, thus avoiding loss of pitch control.
options.b: the position of the flaps/slats is automatically adjusted in order to maintain symmetry and to prevent loss of control.
options.c: operation of the flaps/slats is stopped, thus avoiding or minimising issues with lateral controllability.
options.d: aeroplane primary flight controls are automatically adjusted to allow continued operation of the flaps/slats.
